channel.title: TGRoss
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGRoss, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Big Swings in this “Dispersed” Market
item.description: Hey, Ross here: Yesterday I talked about the dispersion we’re seeing in the markets… About how we’re seeing a sharp rise in BOTH winners and losers. T...

item.title: The Market’s Strange Paradox
item.description: Hey, Ross here: The market chop continues… But the Feb 5 low continues to hold as support. Still, don’t expect this bumpy ride to end anytime soon… Es...

item.title: Hidden Areas of Strength
item.description: Hey, Ross here: Welcome back. Last week was the worst week for stocks in 2026. So for today, let’s look at what could be in store for the rest of the ...

item.title: Season of Volatility
item.description: Hey, Ross here: I’ve been talking so much about the current market rotation that it’s easy to forget we’re still in earnings season. And as today’s ch...

item.title: From Losers to Winners
item.description: Hey, Ross here: The sideways chop continues in the major indexes. As I said yesterday – it’s an extremely frustrating market for “S&P 500 or Nasdaq on...
